narrative:
Blue Ash 4-B (precinct in Hamilton County) has 984 registered voters, with 50.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.5 percentage points.
